drivers.notes: Vented; Hybrid Cross-Section Expanded Tractrix horn

description.en: Mid-sized two-way floorstander of the Reference Premiere II line — 1" titanium LTS tweeter in a Hybrid Cross-Section Tractrix horn paired with twin 6.5" Cerametallic woofers with Faraday rings. Dual rear Tractrix ports, 96 dB sensitivity and 500 W peak handling.
description.es: Floorstander de dos vías de tamaño medio de la línea Reference Premiere II — tweeter LTS de titanio de 1" en horn Tractrix Hybrid Cross-Section junto a dos woofers Cerametallic de 6,5" con anillos Faraday. Doble puerto trasero Tractrix, 96 dB de sensibilidad y 500 W de pico.
